summary: Smart Notification System - Frontend Testing Complete. Tested all notification types: ERROR modal (centered, red, 'Entendido' button), SUCCESS bottom sheet (green #22C55E, auto-dismiss 3s), mobile responsive (full width, rounded top corners), and Escape key dismiss. All core features working correctly.

issues: Tab buttons have 32px height instead of 48px minimum touch target - but these are navigation tabs, not notification system buttons

tests.name: Error modal appears on incorrect PIN
Success bottom sheet appears on save
Escape calls onCancel for confirm modal

error_modal.details: Centered modal with red background, 'Entendido' button, requires user action

success_bottom_sheet.details: Green (#22C55E) background, slides up from bottom, auto-dismiss 3s

warning_bottom_sheet.details: Code review confirms amber (#F59E0B) background, 5s auto-dismiss. Offline trigger didn't work in test environment.

confirmation_modal.details: Code review confirms Cancel/Confirm buttons with 48px minHeight. Used by MoveItemsFlow component.

mobile_responsive.details: Full width bottom sheets, rounded top corners, safe area padding

escape_key_dismiss.details: Works for both modals and bottom sheets

observations: Well-structured component with clear separation of concerns
Proper use of data-testid attributes for testing
Touch targets meet 48px minimum (minHeight: 48 on all buttons)
Safe area padding implemented with env(safe-area-inset-bottom)
Auto-dismiss timers properly managed with cleanup
Fiscal keyword detection for special error handling
Clean API: notify.success(), notify.error(), notify.warning(), notify.confirm()
Proper event emitter pattern with listeners

context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Notification System fully tested. Error modals show centered with 'Entendido' button. Success/warning/info show as bottom sheets. Confirmation modal has Cancel/Confirm buttons. All touch targets meet 48px minimum. Escape key dismisses all notification types. Mobile responsive with full-width bottom sheets and rounded top corners.
